phase_note: Breadth K-read batches merged into concepts and chunk buckets; hypothesis→scaffolded where batches substantiated. Run scanners + build_chunk_index.
cross_cutting_notes:
[batch 0] Batch 0 mixes TOC fragments, character-creation chapters, and core rules. Resistance checks and conditions tie Abilities (defense bonuses) to Combat resolution; opposed checks and skill pairings bridge Skills and Checks. Several excerpts are table-of-contents or incomplete lines and should not drive new epics without K-read follow-up.

[batch 1] Batch 1 ties Skills to Checks via DCs, opposed rolls, and circumstance modifiers; powers reference attack checks, effect checks, and resistance checks; damage and material toughness link Combat resolution to ranked measurements. Advantages and power extras/flaws modify effective cost and resolution of checks in play.

[batch 2] Batch 2 is dominated by PowerEffect construction (effects, extras/flaws, fractional PP cost, Alternate Effects/arrays, descriptors, devices, equipment, inventing) with recurring ties to skill checks (Perception, Insight, Acrobatics, Expertise, Technology) and resistance/attack resolution (Fortitude, Will, Dodge, Toughness, attack checks). Several chunks are sensory or gear-adjacent (olfactory, survival/SCUBA, criminal surveillance) that still route through powers, equipment, or check modifiers.

[batch 3] Batch 3 mixes gear, vehicles, headquarters, constructs, and conflict chapters. Effect ranks and Affliction/Fortitude DCs tie equipment examples to Powers and ResistanceCheck; attack and defense class tie Abilities to Checks; suffocation, falling, poisons, and hazards link Rank/Measurement intuitions to Fortitude/Toughness loops; minions and Impervous examples alter default attack and resistance resolution. Many chunks are tables, lists, or PDF fragments—concepts stay hypothesis/scaffolded pending cleaner source reads.
open_questions: unit_00001: chunk is effectively empty (PDF pointer only); no mechanism to map.
unit_00092, unit_00098: armor and constructs (equipment/headquarters) are outside the six spine modules.
unit_00108: GM assigning difficulties is GM procedure, not a concrete Check/DifficultyClass object rule in this excerpt.
unit_00177: new-GM reading guidance; not a spine mechanism.
unit_00264: session/scene narrative structure; not covered by spine modules.
unit_00371: move actions (action economy) is outside the named spine modules.
unit_00401: fragment only (weakened line); insufficient to scaffold a Condition concept beyond parent chunk.
unit_00452, unit_00466, unit_00472: hero points (scene editing, inspiration, earning) are not represented in the current map-model-spec spine concepts.
unit_00597, unit_00603, unit_00621, unit_00638, unit_00646: complications, motivations, injuries—story/HP economy, not mapped to the six modules.
unit_00626: bullet placeholder only; no substantive text.
unit_00665, unit_00671, unit_00679, unit_00711: naming, appearance, alien origin flavor—character creation outside spine mechanics.
unit_00584: NPC effective power level vs. points is GM approximation; relationship to PowerPoints/PowerLevel limits needs parent decision.
unit_00946: Acrobatics maneuver text is truncated mid-sentence; full DC/task set for stunts not available in this chunk.
unit_01144: Perception chunk lists only the heading 'Awareness' with no mechanical rule.
unit_01307: Introductory narrative on advantages does not add a distinct spine mechanism beyond existing Advantage / check modifiers.
unit_01944: Trapping with Create cuts off mid-rule (attack + Dodge resistance incomplete).
unit_01997: Material Toughness lists substance names without numeric rank values in this excerpt; mapping to Toughness ranks needs adjacent handbook text.
unit_00925: Deluxe skill name list overlaps batch_0 SkillCatalog (unit_00029); confirm single canonical catalog vs. edition variants.
unit_01032: Player advice on 'utility skills' is guidance only, not a distinct mechanical object.
unit_02539 is a fragment with a FLAWS header but body about extended hearing; section alignment in the corpus is unclear.
unit_02096 and unit_02593 mix multiple rules (effects/OCR layout); confirm whether they should be split for modeling.
unit_02776 and unit_02878 are partial excerpts; full Area-range and Covering-attack rules may need adjacent chunks.
unit_02593 combines Strike with minion-related extras (Sacrifice, Variable minions); confirm epic ownership vs. a Minions or Sidekicks cross-cutting area.
unit_03381: Projectile-weapons chunk is garbled (repeated effect names without table structure); cannot recover rank/cost rows from text alone.
unit_03441: Shields/armor lines mix stat bonuses with unrelated equipment names; unclear which numbers map to which traits.
unit_03561: SPACE VEHICLES chunk is numeric fragment only (12 14 14 16) with no labels.
unit_03680: PERSONNEL feature text is truncated mid-sentence; staffing rules incomplete.
unit_03696: SECRET feature excerpt starts mid-rule; rebuild timing/conditions not fully stated.
unit_03875, unit_03887: Single-number or numeric noise chunks; no interpretable rule.
unit_03976: ENVIRONMENTAL HAZARDS opens a topic but cuts off before hazard mechanics.
unit_04074: Narrative play-example opener only; no additional mechanical spine beyond flavor.
unit_04128_merged: MINIONS text is corrupted (bullet gaps, Parry/Dodge sentence spliced in); routine-check and worst-degree rules need a clean K-read.
unit_04248: FINISHING ATTACK cuts off before full routine-check rule is stated.
Equipment/vehicles/HQ features (many chunks): rich setting content; mapping to the six spine modules often indirect (effect ranks, DCs, checks) and may need Equipment chapter pairing.

module.name: Ranks and measures
module.description: Rank values map to concrete measurements (distance, time, mass, volume) via the measurements table.

concepts.name: Rank
concepts.owns: Owns which discrete step on the measurement scale applies to a quantity for a given rank.

concepts.name: MeasurementTable
concepts.owns: Owns the table mapping each rank row to concrete units (distance, time, mass, volume, etc.).

concepts.name: TimeMeasureRow
concepts.owns: Owns the ordered list of concrete time durations corresponding to rank steps on the measurements scale.

concepts.name: AthleticsJumpDistanceFromCheck
concepts.owns: Owns converting an Athletics check result into jump distance in feet, with divisors for standing, vertical, and standing-vertical jumps, and routine distance from (Athletics bonus + 10).

concepts.name: MaterialToughnessOrdinalScale
concepts.owns: Owns ordered material names for Toughness comparisons (paper through super-alloys) as a rank-ordered scale pending numeric rank binding from adjacent rules.

concepts.name: CombatRoundDurationEstimate
concepts.owns: Owns that one action round represents about six seconds of in-world time when turn order and per-turn limits matter.

concepts.name: FallDamageRankFromDistanceRank
concepts.owns: Owns fall damage as base rank 4 plus twice the distance rank fallen, capped at rank 16, before other surface or catcher adjustments.

concepts.name: EnvironmentalHazardIntensityExamples
concepts.owns: Owns example ranked intensities for radiation sources and fire/heats (torch through chemical accelerants) as a hazard reference scale fragment.

concepts.name: VehicleSizeCategoryPointCost
concepts.owns: Owns that vehicles default to medium size and each step up in size category costs one power point, adjusting base Strength, Toughness, and Defense (exact deltas truncated in chunk).

epic.name: Translate measurements
epic.statement: **Player** interprets **Rank** using **MeasurementTable** rows for distance, time, and related scales.

module.name: Abilities
module.description: The eight abilities and their ranks define the hero's baseline capability profile.

concepts.name: Ability
concepts.owns: Owns which of the eight core abilities applies to a rolled or derived value.

concepts.name: AbilityRank
concepts.owns: Owns the numeric rank value for each ability on the hero sheet.

concepts.name: Stamina
concepts.owns: Owns physical resilience: applies to Toughness, Fortitude, and Stamina checks when no specific defense applies.

concepts.name: Awareness
concepts.owns: Owns intuition and common sense: applies to Will, Insight and Perception skill checks, and Awareness checks when no skill applies.

concepts.name: AbilityRankPurchase
concepts.owns: Owns spending 2 power points per +1 ability rank, subject to power level limits.

concepts.name: InteractionTargetMentalThreshold
concepts.owns: Owns circumstance penalties and outright prohibition when using interaction skills on subjects by Intellect rank (–5 at Int –5, unusable if missing mental abilities) and awareness/understanding requirements.

concepts.name: ConstructAdvantageAbilityGate
concepts.owns: Owns that constructs cannot take advantages that require abilities the construct does not have (parallel to skill restrictions).

concepts.name: StaminaBreathHoldRoundBudget
concepts.owns: Owns holding breath for ten rounds plus rounds equal to twice Stamina rank before suffocation Fortitude checks begin.

epic.name: Express abilities
epic.statement: **Player** assigns and reads **Ability** and **AbilityRank** when building and playing the hero.

module.name: Checks and tasks
module.description: Tasks use checks against a Difficulty Class; degrees of success and failure interpret the margin.

concepts.name: Check
concepts.owns: Owns when a d20 roll plus modifiers is compared to a target to resolve a task outcome.

concepts.name: DifficultyClass
concepts.owns: Owns the fixed target number a check must meet or beat for success.

concepts.name: OpposedCheck
concepts.owns: Owns resolving a contest by comparing two check results as the DC, with tie-breakers for equal results.

concepts.name: CriticalSuccess
concepts.owns: Owns increasing degree of success by one when the d20 shows a natural 20 on a check.

concepts.name: ToolingPenalty
concepts.owns: Owns imposing -5 on a check without required tools, or -2 with makeshift tools when the GM allows.

concepts.name: PrecariousSurfaceMovementCheck
concepts.owns: Owns moving along a precarious surface at ground speed minus 1 rank after a successful Acrobatics check vs. surface DC, with degrees of failure costing movement or causing a fall.

concepts.name: SkillCheckModifierSources
concepts.owns: Owns that miscellaneous modifiers from circumstances, advantages, and powers stack toward meeting or beating a DC (often based on another character's traits).

concepts.name: AcrobaticsTaskMenu
concepts.owns: Owns named Acrobatics applications (lessen fall damage per degree, acrobatic maneuver, prone-to-stand free action, contort through tight space) as task labels for checks.

concepts.name: ClimbCircumstanceModifierTable
concepts.owns: Owns listed circumstance modifiers for climbing (bracing, corner, short climb, slipperiness, speed bonus, vulnerability while climbing).

concepts.name: DeceptionBelievabilityDCAdjustment
concepts.owns: Owns DC shifts for Deception based on target willingness and how believable or risky the deception is (–5 to +20 per listed factors).

concepts.name: ForensicEvidenceAnalysisCheck
concepts.owns: Owns Investigation check (base DC 15, time and disturbance modifiers) to extract information from existing evidence; two+ degrees of failure may mislead at GM discretion.

concepts.name: VisualPerceptionVisibilityDC
concepts.owns: Owns baseline DCs for spotting something by sight (plain sight 0, subtle 5–10+), opposed Stealth, and ties to disguise and concealed objects per linked skills.

concepts.name: JuryRiggedRepairCheck
concepts.owns: Owns temporary Technology repair with total –10 DC adjustment, standard-action check, single problem fixed, lasting until scene end, then requiring full repair before re-jury-rigging.

concepts.name: SecurityOrTrapDCLadder
concepts.owns: Owns escalating DC rungs (10 through 40+5) for bypassing security/traps, with failure doing nothing and multiple degrees of failure triggering alarms or traps when possible.

concepts.name: UltimateEffortFixedResult
concepts.owns: Owns spending a hero point to treat a check result as 20 for Ultimate Aim (next round's aimed attack check), Ultimate Resistance (one chosen defense), or Ultimate Skill (one skill).

concepts.name: OpposedEffectCheck
concepts.owns: Owns opposed checks where an effect’s rank or user sets DC or competes with a target’s roll (e.g., Illusion vs. Insight, Mind Reading vs. Will).

concepts.name: AttackCheckVersusDefenseClass
concepts.owns: Owns attack resolution as d20 plus attack bonus meeting or beating the target defense class to hit.

concepts.name: RoutineAttackCheckAgainstMinion
concepts.owns: Owns that non-minions may treat attack checks against minions as routine checks (minion combat chunk partially corrupted).

concepts.name: TechnologyRestrictedCommunicationsDC
concepts.owns: Owns DC 25 on a Technology skill check to gain illegal access to restricted communication systems when the GM allows.

concepts.name: CatchFallingTargetDexterityDC
concepts.owns: Owns DC 5 Dexterity check to catch a falling person or object, then subtract catcher Strength (or GM-approved power rank) from fall damage rank for split remainder damage.

concepts.name: AllOutAttackDefenseForAttackTrade
concepts.owns: Owns voluntarily taking up to -2 on Dodge and Parry until start of next turn to add up to +2 attack bonus, with defenses not below +0 and attack not more than doubled.

concepts.name: StandardAndMoveActionPerCombatRound
concepts.owns: Owns that during a combat round a character can take one standard action and one move action on their turn (in addition to free/reaction rules elsewhere).

concepts.name: ReactionVersusFreeActionTiming
concepts.owns: Owns that reactions are like free actions in speed but can occur off-turn in response to events, unlike conscious free actions on your turn.

depends_on.reason: Difficulty values and measurement scales align with ranked tables (cited in check rules).

epic.name: Resolve checks
epic.statement: **Player** rolls a **Check** against **DifficultyClass** and applies degree outcomes.

module.name: Skills
module.description: Skills apply trained or untrained use of abilities to specific tasks, usually as skill checks.

concepts.name: Skill
concepts.owns: Owns which trained ability applies to a given category of task.

concepts.name: SkillCheck
concepts.owns: Owns the roll procedure when a skill (trained or untrained) applies to a task.

concepts.name: SkillCatalog
concepts.owns: Owns the named default skill list (Acrobatics through Vehicles) as the chapter index for skill descriptions.

concepts.name: OpposedSkillPairing
concepts.owns: Owns which opposing skill is rolled for common contests (e.g. Stealth vs Perception).

concepts.name: InteractionSkill
concepts.owns: Owns social interaction skills aimed at influencing others, requiring subjects to be aware and able to understand the user, with stronger use on sufficiently intelligent subjects.

concepts.name: CloseCombatSkillSpecialization
concepts.owns: Owns separate Close Combat skills per specific close attack (weapon or power), granting attack check bonus equal to skill rank, with scope limits (e.g. not all unarmed maneuvers).

concepts.name: ExpertiseRoutineAndPlayerBoundary
concepts.owns: Owns using Expertise checks or routine (bonus + 10) to bound what the character knows versus player knowledge; GM may allow hero-point 'hunch' exceptions.

concepts.name: CovertMessageSkillExchange
concepts.owns: Owns Deception (innuendo) DCs for covert messages and recipient Insight against the same DC to understand; Insight also used to detect hidden Deception messages.

concepts.name: InsightVersusIllusion
concepts.owns: Owns secret Insight check (DC 10 + Illusion rank) to notice flaws in an illusion, revealing it as unreal.

concepts.name: InvestigationVersusPerceptionSearch
concepts.owns: Owns that Perception notices immediately while Investigation finds clues, traps, and details with effort when searching an area.

concepts.name: PersuasionAttitudeShift
concepts.owns: Owns attitude track (hostile through helpful), standard-action persuasion, limits during conflict, repeated attempts against initial attitude, and degree-based shifts with example.

concepts.name: SleightOfHandContortionAndObservation
concepts.owns: Owns DC 30 contortion through tight openings and minor legerdemain (DC 10) opposed by observer Perception when watched.

concepts.name: StealthTailingProcedure
concepts.owns: Owns tailing at normal speed with cover, Perception checks on course changes or once if unsuspecting, and Deception vs Insight to pass off being noticed.

concepts.name: TechnologyInventingPrerequisite
concepts.owns: Owns using Technology to create inventions when the character has the Inventor advantage, deferring full rules to the Inventing section.

concepts.name: TreatmentDiagnosisAndAilmentAssist
concepts.owns: Owns minute-long diagnosis granting +2 circumstance on later Treatment checks at GM discretion, and Treatment checks each resistance attempt against disease/poison to grant +2 or +5 to the patient's resistance on degrees of success.

concepts.name: SkillCheckPicksEffectTask
concepts.owns: Owns which skill applies when an effect’s operation is modeled as a task (examples: Acrobatics, Deception, Expertise).

concepts.name: TechnologySkillHQCommunicationsUse
concepts.owns: Owns Technology skill as the gate for illegal access to restricted bands on headquarters communications gear, given user clearance and GM permission.

concepts.name: AcrobaticsMitigateFallDistance
concepts.owns: Owns Acrobatics skill allowing falls from greater distances without damage (exact thresholds not in this chunk).

concepts.name: TechnologyRepairDamagedObjects
concepts.owns: Owns using the Technology skill guidelines to repair damaged objects that lack Stamina-based natural recovery (per conflict recovery discussion).

depends_on.reason: Skills apply ability ranks and modifiers to trained tasks.
Skill checks are resolved as checks against DC.

epic.name: Apply skills
epic.statement: **Player** invokes **Skill** and **SkillCheck** when a task calls for trained expertise.

module.name: Powers
module.description: Powers are built from effects, ranked with power points, and expressed as abilities on the character.

concepts.name: PowerEffect
concepts.owns: Owns the mechanical effect definition and rank for a purchased power.

concepts.name: PowerPoints
concepts.owns: Owns the budget spent to build and rank powers on the character.

concepts.name: Advantage
concepts.owns: Owns minor benefits between skills and powers, sometimes ranked, purchased with power points.

concepts.name: Descriptor
concepts.owns: Owns labels such as origin (mutant, mystic, alien) applied to powers for interaction with effects and devices.

concepts.name: ExtraEffortPowerSurge
concepts.owns: Owns temporarily increasing one power effect by +1 rank until the start of the hero's next turn.

concepts.name: PowerLevel
concepts.owns: Owns the series limit that sets starting power points and caps where traits may be spent.

concepts.name: AdvantageNameGroupings
concepts.owns: Owns exemplar groupings of advantage names (general and skill-related lists) as handbook index material for character building.

concepts.name: AdvantageRankAndDescriptionPattern
concepts.owns: Owns that advantages are listed with name, type, optional ranks, and text describing benefits including extra rank effects and comparisons to characters without the advantage.

concepts.name: PowerEffectStandardCostPerRank
concepts.owns: Owns that each power effect is bought in ranks like other traits, with greater rank meaning greater effect, and each effect has a standard cost per rank.

concepts.name: SeriesRequiredDescriptorRule
concepts.owns: Owns GM-mandated descriptors (e.g. mutant, psychic) applying to all powers in a series unless justified otherwise, with possible Benefit or complications for exceptions.

concepts.name: PowerEffectType
concepts.owns: Owns categorization of power effects into types that share rules and provide descriptors for interactions with other effects.

concepts.name: DefensePowerEffectPattern
concepts.owns: Owns that defense effects typically grant resistance bonuses or immunity, often personal, subtle, permanent, or free-action sustained with on/off vulnerability.

concepts.name: PowerActivationAndResolution
concepts.owns: Owns that some effects work automatically while others require effort such as attack or effect checks, and effects on others allow resistance checks unless waived.

concepts.name: PowerEffectNameTableFragment
concepts.owns: Owns partial alphabetical index rows of power effect names as handbook fragments (two consecutive table chunks).

concepts.name: PowerEffectSummaryLine
concepts.owns: Owns the standard one-line presentation of Action, Range, Duration, and Cost for an effect block.

concepts.name: PowerExtraSection
concepts.owns: Owns the extras subsection listing optional modifiers for an effect, including effect-unique extras highlighted in handbook layout.

concepts.name: SamplePowerWriteupSchema
concepts.owns: Owns the fields for sample powers: name, listed effect(s) with modifiers, and cost (per rank, flat, or hybrid).

concepts.name: AlternateFormDescriptorPackages
concepts.owns: Owns example alternate forms (energy, gaseous, ghost, heroic, liquid, particulate, shadow, solid, swarm, two-dimensional) expressed as bundled suggested effects and modifiers.

concepts.name: BlastRangedDamageEffect
concepts.owns: Owns the Blast sample: ranged Damage at 2 points per rank, ranged attack vs Dodge, damage equal to rank, Toughness resistance, with optional descriptor narrowing flaw text.

concepts.name: CommunicationLimitedFlaw
concepts.owns: Owns Limited flaw examples for Communication (audience group restriction; Communication-Dependent carrier for other perception-range effects) with –1 cost per rank where applicable.

concepts.name: PerceptionRangeTargetingAndConcealment
concepts.owns: Owns that perception-range effects need accurate perception of the target (total concealment blocks), optional acute-sense Perception check to locate, and +5 resistance if concealed.

concepts.name: ConcealmentEffectExtras
concepts.owns: Owns extras for Concealment (Affects Others, Area, Attack, Precise) with stated point or per-rank costs and interaction rules.

concepts.name: CreateEffectExtras
concepts.owns: Owns extras for Create (Continuous, Impervious, Innate, Movable, Precise, Selective) with cost notes and object behavior implications.

concepts.name: EnhancedTraitLimitedAndPermanent
concepts.owns: Owns Limited flaw patterns and Permanent modifier behavior for Enhanced Trait (always on, no extra effort stunts, complication for rare limits).

concepts.name: PowerModifierCatalog
concepts.owns: Owns named extras and flaws that adjust power point cost per rank or add flat costs, and how they combine (including fractional PP:R ratios).

concepts.name: AlternateEffectArray
concepts.owns: Owns themed Alternate Effect collections, GM oversight, and point-budget constraints relative to a primary effect.

concepts.name: DescriptorLayer
concepts.owns: Owns descriptor types (including result descriptors), when descriptors are applied or revealed in play, and hero-point handling for descriptor surprises.

concepts.name: EquipmentAfflictionFortitudeDCExample
concepts.owns: Owns taser as compressed-air darts imposing Affliction resisted by Fortitude at DC 15 (equipment-stated effect parameters).

concepts.name: ConstructArchetypePowerExamples
concepts.owns: Owns sample construct power packages (e.g. undead Fortitude Immunity; armor Protection; robot Fortitude Immunity; giant Growth) as minion-scale references.

concepts.name: AlternateVehicleEquipmentPointPricing
concepts.owns: Owns paying full equipment cost for the most expensive vehicle and one equipment point per additional vehicle of same or lesser cost (Alternate Equipment pattern for vehicles).

concepts.name: HeadquartersDefenseSystemEffectCap
concepts.owns: Owns HQ defense emplacements using attack effects costing no more than twice headquarters power level, with attack bonus equal to that power level.

depends_on.reason: Power builds tie to ability defenses and ranks.
Powers use attack checks, effect checks, and resistance DCs.

epic.name: Acquire powers
epic.statement: **Player** spends **PowerPoints** to define **PowerEffect** entries on the hero sheet.

module.name: Combat resolution
module.description: Conditions track temporary states; resistance checks resolve many hostile effects.

concepts.name: Condition
concepts.owns: Owns which temporary status applies to a character and how it alters play.

concepts.name: ResistanceCheck
concepts.owns: Owns the saving throw against an effect when rules call for Fortitude, Will, or Dodge resistance.

concepts.name: BasicCondition
concepts.owns: Owns single-modifier status building blocks (e.g. compelled, controlled, dazed, debilitated, defenseless) that compose conditions.

concepts.name: InitiativeCheck
concepts.owns: Owns ordering turns using d20 plus initiative modifier (Agility + Improved Initiative + power modifiers).

concepts.name: ActiveDefenseDegradation
concepts.owns: Owns halving Dodge and Parry when vulnerable and reducing both to 0 when defenseless.

concepts.name: IntimidationDemoralize
concepts.owns: Owns standard-action Intimidation in combat to impose impaired (–2 checks) or, with four+ degrees of success, disabled (–5 checks) until end of aggressor's next round.

concepts.name: FightingStyleAdvantageBundleExamples
concepts.owns: Owns sample combinations of advantages illustrating martial fighting styles (boxing, judo, kung fu, sword-fighting, wrestling) including optional Close Attack ranks.

concepts.name: EffectResistanceWaiverRules
concepts.owns: Owns voluntary waiver of resistance except Toughness; optional discontinuation of sustained/continuous Toughness bonuses; Immunity skipping checks; Instant duration definition start.

concepts.name: DamageResistanceDegreeOutcomes
concepts.owns: Owns Toughness resistance vs (damage rank + 15) with degrees mapping to cumulative –1 circumstance, dazed, staggered, incapacitated, and repeated stagger leading to fourth-degree effect.

concepts.name: CoveringAttack
concepts.owns: Owns trade-offs where a target accepts exposure to a covering attack to gain an automatic attack in return (uses attack checks).

concepts.name: TurnStartEndsUntilNextTurnEffects
concepts.owns: Owns ending effects that last until the start of your next turn when that turn begins (partial turn-start checklist).

concepts.name: ToughnessResistanceAfterDamageHit
concepts.owns: Owns that a successful hit with Damage forces a Toughness resistance check.

concepts.name: SuffocationFortitudeEscalation
concepts.owns: Owns repeating Fortitude checks (DC 10 +1 per prior success) each round after breath limit; failure leads to incapacitated then dying unless breathing restored; Immunity to Suffocation bypasses.

concepts.name: ConditionsFromResistanceFailure
concepts.owns: Owns that failed resistance checks against attacks impose conditions by effect type and failure degree, referencing effect text and Conditions in Basics.

concepts.name: AreaAndPerceptionAutomaticEffectResolution
concepts.owns: Owns that Perception and Area attacks skip attack checks, cannot crit or miss, and ignore attack-check modifiers including maneuvers.

concepts.name: ImperviousSkipsUnneededAttackRoll
concepts.owns: Owns skipping attack rolls when incoming damage cannot overcome Impervious Toughness threshold (play-example: guns vs Impervious 8).

concepts.name: MinionCombatResolutionPackage
concepts.owns: Owns bundled minion combat exceptions: no critical hits vs non-minions; failed resistance suffers worst effect degree; routine attacks allowed for non-minions (chunk partially corrupted).

concepts.name: DamageConditionMinuteRecovery
concepts.owns: Owns living targets removing one damage condition per minute of rest from most severe downward; Healing/Regeneration accelerates; objects without Stamina need repair instead.

concepts.name: HeroDeathVersusMinionLethality
concepts.owns: Owns rare, staged PC death path versus simpler minion elimination on successful attack plus intent; slam damage immunity ranks referenced.

concepts.name: OptionalInitiativeForTimedChallenge
concepts.owns: Owns GM discretion to skip initiative when order is irrelevant, or roll initiative when timing matters (e.g. collapse after first round, hazards with initiative).

depends_on.reason: Resistance saves use defense abilities; conditions alter capability.
Resistance checks are checks against an effect DC.
